args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00'
  AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00'
  AND status = 'Closed'
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases_managed
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00'
  AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00'
GROUP BY ownerid;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases_managed
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00'
  AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00'
GROUP BY ownerid;

args.query:
WITH non_transferred_cases AS (
    SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    LEFT JOIN casehistory__c h
      ON h.caseid__c = c.id
     AND h.field__c = 'OwnerId'
    WHERE h.id IS NULL
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00'
      AND c.status = 'Closed'
), agent_stats AS (
    SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
           COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS non_transferred_cases_count,
           AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_seconds
    FROM non_transferred_cases
    GROUP BY ownerid
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_stats
WHERE agent_id IN (
    SELECT agent_id
    FROM (
        SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases
        FROM "Case"
        WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00'
          AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00'
        GROUP BY ownerid
    ) t
    WHERE total_cases > 1
)
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH non_transferred_cases AS (
    SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    LEFT JOIN casehistory__c h
      ON h.caseid__c = c.id
     AND h.field__c = 'OwnerId'
    WHERE h.id IS NULL
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00'
      AND c.status = 'Closed'
), agent_stats AS (
    SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
           COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS non_transferred_cases_count,
           AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_seconds
    FROM non_transferred_cases
    GROUP BY ownerid
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_stats
WHERE agent_id IN (
    SELECT agent_id
    FROM (
        SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases
        FROM "Case"
        WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00'
          AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00'
        GROUP BY ownerid
    ) t
    WHERE total_cases > 1
)
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
